title: Verify Pause Trial Functionality and UI Update
description: Test that a user can successfully pause their trial and that the UI reflects this new state on both the homepage and in the Trial Corner.
preconditions: User has an active trial and is in the experiment cohort.

steps.description: 3. On the confirmation pop-up, click the primary action to 'Pause'.

expected_result: The trial status is updated to 'Paused'. In the Trial Corner, content sections become locked. The homepage widget updates to the 'paused' design. The 'pause-clicked' event is fired.
